Strictly dominated by deepseek-v4-flash:direct (DeepSeek native API at https://api.deepseek.com) on the canonical corpus (2026-05-23). The 2026-05-14 6/6 JSON-gate failures (character-level malformation, leaked </think> tags) and the #63.7-A4 live-compile failure on the Buffett source were caused by Alibaba's OpenAI-compatibility layer stripping or mis-routing 'response_format' for non-Qwen models, NOT a capability gap in deepseek-v4-flash itself (corrected diagnosis 2026-05-23, overturning the 2026-05-15 reasoning). Empirical proof: direct-route fire returned S0=1.000, M1-M5=1.000, M7=3578ms (2.75x faster than this entry's best historical 9830ms). The qwen3.6-flash 'control' on 2026-05-15 was misframed: it only proved Alibaba's native Qwen model survived its own routing, not that all models survive the compat layer. Keep dropped as audit trail of the routing-vs-capability investigation.

Retired 2026-07-21 (Joseph) hours after being added, on its first cohort run (2026-07-21T00-51-24_EDT): 3/36 sources quarantined — 2 structured-contract failures at compile (summary_slug absent from pages[].slug on Obsidian CLI Skills; pages[3].status='high' — a confidence value in the status enum — on Quotes from Napoleon) + 1 DashScope content-filter 400 (data_inspection_failed) at pass1 on the Li Lu lecture (provider moderation false positive; gpt-5.4-mini + deepseek-v4-flash compiled the same source cleanly that night). Bottom board score 6.00 (rank 7/7); weak graph KPIs (link_density 0.863, entity_search_key_resolution 0.179, graph_score 0.192). Consistent with the qwen-flash family pattern (qwen-flash-us dropped 2026-05-10; qwen3.5-flash bottom-tier 2026-06-07). n=1 stochastic caveat on the 2 compile failures; the provider content-filter class is the durable concern for vault-scale ingest. Kept as audit trail; run dir benchmark/runs/qwen3.6-flash-us-2026-07-21T00-51-24_EDT retained.

Retired 2026-07-21 (Joseph) hours after being added, on TWO same-night cohort runs at both thinking levels (minimal: 2026-07-21T01-09-32_EDT — 10 quarantined, $2.39, board 8.00; low: 2026-07-21T01-46-20_EDT — 13 quarantined, $2.38, board 10.00). Systematic contract-shape failure on Pass-2: ~72% of calls failed attempt 1; dominant signature JSONDecodeError 'Extra data' — a valid JSON object followed by trailing content (clean STOP, no truncation, outputs 0.9-1.8K tokens); #104 retry rescued only ~half (11 then 9); entity_reuse 0 and search-key resolution ~0.11 even on passes; semantic_pass 0.65/0.59. Third confirmation of the gemini + json_object Pass-2 weakness class (gemini-3.1-flash-lite 2026-06-07: pass-2-heavy quarantines). temperature was omitted (null) per 3.5 dropping legacy sampling params; thinking level is NOT the lever (both flopped identically). Un-retire trigger: #111 Phase-2 response_json_schema (schema-constrained decode forces single-object output) — re-test when it lands. Run dirs retained: benchmark/runs/gemini-3.5-flash-2026-07-21T01-09-32_EDT + ...T01-46-20_EDT.

Retired 2026-07-21 (Joseph) hours after being added, on its first cohort run (thinking disabled via pool) (2026-07-21T10-45-04_EDT — 5 quarantined of 36, $1.22 recorded, board 26.00, rank 4/5, slowest in field at 50:30). Two failure classes: (1) 4x systematic structured-contract slip — page_type omitted on every non-summary page (pages[1..N]; page 0 correct) with otherwise well-formed output; #104 retry rescued only 1 of 5. (2) z.ai mandatory content filter (HTTP 400, code 1301) hard-blocked the Li Lu lecture at Pass-2 — the SAME source DashScope Green Net blocked in the qwen3.6-flash-us run → two-provider (Alibaba + Zhipu) compliance-layer pattern; provider-level vault-scale risk with no disable switch (official remedy: 'modify input and retry' / submit ticket). Graph score middling (0.525 vs deepseek 0.60, gpt 0.925); latency worst in cohort (Borda 0.0; one Pass-2 call 98.6s); most expensive run ($1.22 vs gpt $0.85) at $1.2/$4.0 per 1M. Un-retire trigger: none identified — agentic tuning brings nothing to the extraction workload; would need both the contract-slip class and the latency/cost gap addressed. Provider wiring (zai) retained in call_model.py for future GLM models. Run dir retained: benchmark/runs/glm-5-turbo-2026-07-21T10-45-04_EDT.
